articles.title: HP fined 1.4 billion rupees for “cartelization” of ink cartridges, toner, PCs
articles.content: Resellers threatened to ditch HP printing supplies for counterfeits.
articles.titleZh: 惠普因墨盒、碳粉、个人电脑的“卡特尔化”被罚款14亿卢比
articles.contentZh: 经销商威胁要放弃惠普打印用品的假冒产品。

articles.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
articles.content: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.
articles.titleZh: 现在，即使是俄罗斯最精英的黑客也在使用Clickfix来感染设备
articles.contentZh: 社交工程技术主要是出于经济动机的犯罪分子的工具。

articles.title: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
articles.content: Companies coming to market are raising money at fastest pace this century.
articles.titleZh: 随着投资者寻找发挥人工智能热潮的方式，能源IPO激增
articles.contentZh: 本世纪进入市场的公司正在以最快的速度筹集资金。

articles.title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines
articles.content: The convenience store chain will use StorMagic instead.

articles.title: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
articles.content: Get ready for more AI characters in Fortnite. Developer Epic Games is going to let Fortnite creators publish experiences featuring characters with AI-powered voices starting on July 30th, and ahead of that launch, it's created 36 characters with "consistent voices and personas" that creators can use as NPCs. The characters include Fortnite staples like Agent […]
articles.titleZh: Fortnite正在获得一堆人工智能驱动的“角色”
articles.contentZh: 准备好迎接《堡垒之夜》中的更多AI角色吧。从7月30日开始，开发商Epic Games将允许《堡垒之夜》创作者发布使用人工智能声音的角色体验，在发布之前，它已经创建了36个具有“一致声音和角色”的角色，创作者可以将其用作NPC。角色包括Fortnite主食，如Agent […]

articles.title: Samsung’s 55-inch Frame art TV is $200 cheaper than usual
articles.content: Samsung’s Frame is different from your average 4K TV. Its biggest selling point involves what it does when you aren’t actively using it. It can display art, turning your living room into a gallery. The Frame has bezels that make it look like — you guessed it — framed art, and its matte finish can […]
articles.titleZh: 三星55英寸框架艺术电视比平时便宜200 $
articles.contentZh: 三星的Frame与普通的4K电视不同。它最大的卖点在于当您没有积极使用它时它会做什么。它可以展示艺术品，将您的客厅变成画廊。框架的边框使它看起来像—你猜对了—框架艺术，其哑光饰面可以[…]
